lootlog.config.title: Loot Log Configuration
lootlog.config.displayDurationMs.desc: How long each pickup entry stays fully visible before fading out.
lootlog.config.displayDurationMs.detail: Does not include fade-in or fade-out time. Total visible time = Fade In + Display Duration + Fade Out.
lootlog.config.maxEntries.desc: Maximum number of pickup entries visible on screen at once.
lootlog.config.maxEntries.detail: When this limit is reached, the oldest entry is removed to make room for new pickups.
lootlog.config.combineMode.desc: Controls how picking up the same item multiple times is handled.
lootlog.config.combineMode.detail: ALWAYS: Merges all identical items into one entry.
lootlog.config.combineMode.detail2: NEVER: Each pickup creates a separate entry.
lootlog.config.combineMode.detail3: EXCLUDE_NAMED: Merges unnamed items, but custom-named items get their own entry.
lootlog.config.showItems.desc: Show item pickup notifications on the HUD.
lootlog.config.showItems.detail: Disable to hide all item notifications while keeping XP notifications.
lootlog.config.showXp.desc: Show XP orb pickup notifications on the HUD.
lootlog.config.showXp.detail: Disable to hide XP notifications while keeping item notifications.
lootlog.config.anchor.desc: The screen corner where pickup entries appear.
lootlog.config.anchor.detail: Entries grow away from this corner. For example, BOTTOM_RIGHT entries grow upward.
lootlog.config.xOffset.desc: Horizontal distance from the screen edge to the pickup list.
lootlog.config.xOffset.detail: Increases the gap between entries and the edge of the screen.
lootlog.config.yOffset.desc: Vertical distance from the screen edge to the first entry.
lootlog.config.yOffset.detail: Increases the gap between entries and the top/bottom of the screen.
lootlog.config.entrySpacing.desc: Vertical gap between each entry in pixels.
lootlog.config.entrySpacing.detail: Higher values spread entries further apart. Automatically scales with the Scale setting.
lootlog.config.scale.desc: Scales the entire HUD including entry size, spacing, and text.
lootlog.config.scale.detail: Values below 1.0 make entries smaller, above 1.0 makes them larger.
lootlog.config.clampToScreen.desc: Prevents entries from rendering outside the visible screen area.
lootlog.config.clampToScreen.detail: Useful when using large offsets or many entries.
lootlog.config.growthDirection.desc: Controls which direction new entries appear.
lootlog.config.growthDirection.detail: NORMAL: Entries grow away from the anchor corner (bottom grows up, top grows down).
lootlog.config.fadeInMs.desc: Duration of the fade-in animation when a new entry appears.
lootlog.config.fadeInMs.detail: Set to 0 for instant appearance. Also controls the duration of Scale Entrance if enabled.
lootlog.config.fadeOutMs.desc: Duration of the fade-out animation when an entry expires.
lootlog.config.slideDistance.desc: How far entries slide horizontally when entering the screen.
lootlog.config.slideDistance.detail: Entries slide from the screen edge toward the anchor point. Set to 0 to disable sliding.
lootlog.config.fadeOutSlide.desc: Slide entries back toward the screen edge while fading out.
lootlog.config.fadeOutSlide.detail: Reverses the entrance slide animation during fade-out.
lootlog.config.verticalAnimSpeed.desc: Controls how smoothly entries animate when the list shifts.
lootlog.config.verticalAnimSpeed.detail: For example, when an entry disappears and others move to fill the gap. 0.0 = instant snap, higher = slower and smoother.
lootlog.config.slideEasing.desc: The easing curve used for the slide-in animation.
lootlog.config.slideEasing.detail3: BACK_OUT: Slight overshoot then settle back.
lootlog.config.scaleEntrance.desc: Entries scale up from a smaller size during fade-in, creating a pop-in effect.
lootlog.config.scaleEntrance.detail: The starting size is controlled by Entrance Scale Start. The animation lasts for the Fade In duration.
lootlog.config.entranceScaleStart.desc: The starting scale factor when Scale Entrance is enabled.
lootlog.config.entranceScaleStart.detail: Lower values create a more dramatic pop-in. For example, 0.5 means entries start at half size.
lootlog.config.staggerDelayMs.desc: Adds a delay between consecutive entry animations based on list position.
lootlog.config.staggerDelayMs.detail: Creates a cascading entrance effect. Set to 0 to disable.
lootlog.config.backgroundStyle.desc: The visual style for entry backgrounds.
lootlog.config.backgroundStyle.detail5: BANNER: Textured banner with decorative edge and accent layer.
lootlog.config.backgroundStyle.detail6: FLAT: Colored rectangle using the banner element layout.
lootlog.config.decoration.desc: A named decoration preset that overrides the Background Style.
lootlog.config.decoration.detail: Available: 'default_banner'. Leave empty to use Background Style directly.
lootlog.config.layoutPreset.desc: A named layout preset that controls element positioning.
lootlog.config.layoutPreset.detail: Leave empty to auto-detect from Background Style. Most users should leave this empty.
lootlog.config.group.colors.desc: Color settings for backgrounds, text, and counts.
lootlog.config.backgroundColor.desc: The background fill color with alpha transparency.
lootlog.config.backgroundColor.detail: Applies to SOLID, TOOLTIP, and FLAT styles. BANNER and TEXTURE styles use their own textures instead.
lootlog.config.countColor.desc: Text color for the total count display (e.g., 'x64').
lootlog.config.countColor.detail: Only visible when Show Total Count is enabled.
lootlog.config.nameColorOverride.desc: Text color for item names when Use Rarity Colors is disabled.
lootlog.config.nameColorOverride.detail: Ignored when rarity colors are enabled.
lootlog.config.group.text.desc: Controls text visibility, coloring, and formatting for pickup entries.
lootlog.config.showCount.desc: Shows the pickup amount before the item name (e.g., '+3 Diamond').
lootlog.config.showCount.detail: In Banner/Flat layouts, this controls the PICKUP_COUNT element. To reorder elements, use the Banner Layout category.
lootlog.config.useRarityColors.desc: Colors item names by their Minecraft rarity tier.
lootlog.config.useRarityColors.detail: Common = white, Uncommon = yellow, Rare = aqua, Epic = pink.
lootlog.config.useRarityColors.detail2: When disabled, Name Color Override is used instead.
lootlog.config.iconOnRight.desc: Places the icon to the right of the text.
lootlog.config.iconOnRight.detail: Only affects Standard layouts (SOLID, TOOLTIP, TEXTURE, NONE). Banner/Flat layouts use Element Order instead.
lootlog.config.textShadow.desc: Renders all text with Minecraft's standard drop shadow.
lootlog.config.showCountRight.desc: Shows the total accumulated count next to the icon (e.g., 'x64').
lootlog.config.showCountRight.detail: In Banner/Flat layouts, this controls the TOTAL_COUNT element. To reorder elements, use the Banner Layout category.
lootlog.config.animateXpColor.desc: XP entries pulse with a green color animation.
lootlog.config.animateXpColor.detail: Makes XP pickups visually distinct from item pickups.
lootlog.config.group.sizing.desc: Text width limits and background padding. Applies to Standard layouts (SOLID, TOOLTIP, TEXTURE).
lootlog.config.maxNameWidth.desc: Maximum pixel width for item name text before truncation.
lootlog.config.maxNameWidth.detail: Names longer than this are cut off with '...'. Set to 0 for unlimited.
lootlog.config.backgroundHPadding.desc: Horizontal padding between text and background edges.
lootlog.config.backgroundHPadding.detail: Applies to Standard layouts (SOLID, TOOLTIP, TEXTURE).
lootlog.config.backgroundVPadding.desc: Vertical padding between text and background edges.
lootlog.config.backgroundVPadding.detail: Applies to Standard layouts (SOLID, TOOLTIP, TEXTURE).
lootlog.config.group.elementOrder.desc: Controls the order and spacing of elements in Banner and Flat layouts. Elements flow from the decorative edge toward the screen edge.
lootlog.config.bannerElementOrder.desc: Controls the order and visibility of elements in Banner and Flat layouts.
lootlog.config.bannerElementOrder.detail: Comma-separated list from decorative edge to screen edge: PICKUP_COUNT, NAME, ICON, TOTAL_COUNT. Remove an element to hide it.
lootlog.config.decorativeEdgeInset.desc: Pixel inset from the decorative edge to the first element.
lootlog.config.decorativeEdgeInset.detai: Larger values push content further from the tapered edge.
lootlog.config.iconToNameGap.desc: Horizontal gap between the icon and item name.
lootlog.config.nameToCountGap.desc: Horizontal gap between the item name and total count.
lootlog.config.group.body.desc: The main background texture layer of the banner. Controls opacity, color tint, and scrolling animation.
lootlog.config.bodyAlpha.desc: Opacity of the banner body texture layer.
lootlog.config.bodyAlpha.detail: The body is the main background layer of the banner.
lootlog.config.bodyTint.desc: Tint color applied to the banner body texture.
lootlog.config.bodyTint.detail: White means no tint. Change this to recolor the banner without replacing the texture.
lootlog.config.bodyAnimSpeed.desc: Scrolling animation speed for the banner body texture.
lootlog.config.bodyAnimSpeed.detail: 0 = static, higher = faster scrolling. Creates a subtle moving texture effect.
lootlog.config.group.accent.desc: A decorative overlay rendered on top of the banner body. Can be positioned, tinted, and animated independently.
lootlog.config.showAccent.desc: Displays the accent layer on top of the banner body.
lootlog.config.showAccent.detail: The accent is a decorative overlay that can be positioned and tinted independently.
lootlog.config.accentAlpha.desc: Opacity of the banner accent texture layer.
lootlog.config.accentTint.desc: Tint color applied to the accent texture.
lootlog.config.accentTint.detail: White means no tint. Change this to color the accent independently from the body.
lootlog.config.accentAnimSpeed.desc: Scrolling animation speed for the accent texture.
lootlog.config.accentXOffset.detail: Positive values move toward the screen edge, negative toward the decorative edge. Automatically mirrors for left-side anchors.
lootlog.config.accentAnchor.desc: Which element the accent layer aligns to horizontally.
lootlog.config.accentAnchor.detail: EDGE: Aligns to the decorative banner edge.
lootlog.config.accentAnchor.detail2: ICON: Aligns to the item icon.
lootlog.config.accentAnchor.detail3: NAME: Aligns to the item name.
lootlog.config.accentAnchor.detail4: COUNT: Aligns to the total count.
lootlog.config.effectTarget.desc: Which entry types receive icon visual effects.
lootlog.config.effectTarget.detail: ALL: Both items and XP entries.
lootlog.config.effectTarget.detail4: Affects glow, shadow, and pulse effects.
lootlog.config.group.pickupPulse.desc: A brief scale and brightness pop that plays when an item is picked up or an existing entry's count increases.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseEnabled.desc: Entries briefly scale up and flash on each pickup.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseEnabled.detail: Triggers when a new pickup is added or an existing entry's count increases.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseDurationMs.des: How long the pickup pulse animation lasts.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseDurationMs.det: Shorter = snappier pop, longer = more gradual swell.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseOverallScaleSt: How much the entire entry scales up during the pulse.
0.0 = no scaling, 0.1 = 10% larger at peak. Affects the whole entry uniformly.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseOverallAlphaSt: How much the entire entry brightens during the pulse.
lootlog.config.group.pickupPulseAdvanced: Fine-grained pulse strength controls for individual entry elements. These stack with the overall pulse strengths above.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseIconScaleStren: Scale pulse for the icon independently. Stacks with overall.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseIconAlphaStren: Brightness pulse for the icon independently. Stacks with overall.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseNameScaleStren: Scale pulse for the item name text independently.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseNameAlphaStren: Brightness pulse for the item name text independently.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseTotalCountScal: Scale pulse for the total count text independently.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseTotalCountAlph: Brightness pulse for the total count text independently.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseBodyScaleStren: Scale pulse for the banner body layer. Creates a background swell.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseBodyAlphaStren: Brightness pulse for the banner body layer.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseAccentScaleStr: Scale pulse for the banner accent layer.
lootlog.config.pickupPulseAccentAlphaStr: Brightness pulse for the banner accent layer.
lootlog.config.group.progressBar.desc: A thin bar at the bottom of each entry that shows remaining display time.
lootlog.config.showProgressBar.desc: Displays a thin bar at the bottom of each entry.
lootlog.config.showProgressBar.detail: The bar shrinks as the display timer counts down, showing when each entry will disappear.
lootlog.config.progressBarColor.desc: Color and transparency of the progress bar.
lootlog.config.progressBarColor.detail: The alpha channel controls visibility against the entry background.
lootlog.config.progressBarHeight.desc: Height of the progress bar in pixels.
lootlog.config.group.iconGlow.desc: A colored glow effect rendered behind item icons. Supports multiple shapes and optional pulsing animation.
lootlog.config.iconGlowEnabled.desc: Renders a colored glow effect behind item icons.
lootlog.config.iconGlowEnabled.detail: XP orbs always have a built-in green glow regardless of this setting.
lootlog.config.iconGlowColor.desc: Color and intensity of the glow effect.
lootlog.config.iconGlowColor.detail: The alpha channel controls glow intensity.
lootlog.config.iconGlowRadius.desc: Size of the glow extending beyond the icon edges.
lootlog.config.iconGlowRadius.detail: Larger values create a bigger, more diffuse glow.
lootlog.config.iconGlowShape.detail: CIRCLE: Soft circular glow using a texture.
lootlog.config.iconGlowShape.detail2: ITEM: Glow follows the item's silhouette.
lootlog.config.iconGlowSoftness.desc: Controls how gradually the glow fades at its edges.
lootlog.config.iconGlowSoftness.detail: Lower = sharp and defined. Higher = softer, more gradual falloff.
lootlog.config.iconGlowPulseSpeed.desc: Speed of the glow's pulsing animation in cycles per second.
lootlog.config.iconGlowPulseSpeed.detail: Set to 0 for a steady glow with no pulsing.
lootlog.config.iconGlowPulseMin.desc: Minimum glow intensity during the pulse cycle.
lootlog.config.iconGlowPulseMin.detail: 0.0 = glow disappears at dimmest, 1.0 = no visible pulse.
lootlog.config.iconGlowPulseMax.desc: Maximum glow intensity during the pulse cycle.
lootlog.config.iconGlowPulseMax.detail: Should be higher than Pulse Min for a visible effect.
lootlog.config.group.iconShadow.desc: A colored shadow behind item icons that gives them a raised or floating appearance.
lootlog.config.iconShadowEnabled.desc: Renders a colored shadow behind item icons.
lootlog.config.iconShadowEnabled.detail: Gives icons a raised or floating appearance.
lootlog.config.iconShadowColor.desc: Color and transparency of the icon shadow.
lootlog.config.iconShadowColor.detail: Typically semi-transparent black for a natural look.
lootlog.config.iconShadowOffsetX.desc: Horizontal offset of the shadow from the icon.
lootlog.config.iconShadowOffsetY.desc: Vertical offset of the shadow from the icon.
lootlog.config.iconShadowRadius.desc: Blur radius of the shadow in pixels.
lootlog.config.iconShadowRadius.detail: Larger values create a softer, more diffuse shadow.
lootlog.config.iconShadowShape.detail: ITEM: Shadow follows the item's silhouette.
lootlog.config.iconShadowSoftness.desc: Controls how gradually the shadow fades at its edges.
lootlog.config.iconShadowSoftness.detail: Lower = sharper shadow, higher = softer falloff.
lootlog.config.soundEnabled.desc: Plays a sound effect when a new pickup notification appears.
lootlog.config.soundId.detail: Uses Minecraft's namespaced format. Examples: 'minecraft:entity.item.pickup', 'minecraft:entity.experience_orb.pickup'. Modded sounds also work.
lootlog.config.itemBlacklist.desc: Item IDs that will never appear on the HUD.
lootlog.config.itemBlacklist.detail: Uses full registry names (e.g., 'minecraft:cobblestone'). Blacklist takes priority over whitelist.
lootlog.config.itemWhitelist.desc: When non-empty, ONLY items in this list appear on the HUD.
lootlog.config.itemWhitelist.detail: Leave empty to show all items. Uses full registry names.
lootlog.config.modBlacklist.desc: Mod namespaces whose items will never appear on the HUD.
lootlog.config.modBlacklist.detail: E.g., 'create', 'ae2'. Hides all items from those mods. Blacklist takes priority over whitelist.
lootlog.config.modWhitelist.desc: When non-empty, ONLY items from these mods appear on the HUD.
lootlog.config.modWhitelist.detail: Leave empty to show all mods.
